hero.title: Freight transportation for businesses
hero.subtitle: Organize cargo transportation with benefits for your company

vat.title: VAT refund
vat.description: If you work under the general taxation system, you can claim VAT refunds.

limits.title: Limit settings
limits.description: By addresses and geozones, time and days of the week.

cabinet.title: Convenient personal account
cabinet.description: Place orders, top up balance, grant access to employees.

loaders.title: Loader assistance
loaders.description: They will help load and unload heavy shipments.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Cargo is insured up to 500,000 ₽ during transportation.

cabinet.title: Your control center — personal account
cabinet.description: In your personal account you can order shipments or enable your employees to pay for deliveries from the corporate account.

register.title: Register
register.description: Create a personal account and top up your balance.

order.title: Create an order
order.description: Submit a request in the cabinet or via the app.

documents.title: Get documents
documents.description: Closing documents will be available in your account.

office.title: Office relocation
office.description: We will transport office furniture and equipment.

warehouse.title: Warehouse delivery
warehouse.description: We will load and pick up goods of any weight.

intercity.title: Intercity
intercity.description: We will pick up from one city and deliver to another.

customers.title: Customer delivery
customers.description: We will deliver any cargo to your customers.

meta.title: tmGo — Business Platform
meta.description: Multi-regional freight platform. Connecting shippers and carriers.
